---
title: "Claire A. To"
image: imgs/grad.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/claireto    
    - icon: person-badge-fill
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0008-9102-2219
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lDY8BNUAAAAJ
---

## About

Hello! I’m a PhD student in Computer Science at the University of California, Irvine in the [Center for Algorithms and Theory of Computation](https://ics.uci.edu/~theory/). I'm honored to be advised by [Dr. Michael Goodrich](https://ics.uci.edu/~goodrich/).

Contact: claire [dot] to [at] uci [dot] edu

## Research

My research is in [theoretical computer science](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Theoretical_computer_science), with a primary interest in [computational geometry](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Computational_geometry), though I explore a range of problems in [algorithms](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Algorithm). My curiosity for research grew from my early work in [computing education](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Computing_education). My path has been unconventional, guided by the people and opportunities along the way, but I’m grateful for the journey and how it has shaped my perspective both on the field and in life.

## Teaching

**CS 161**: Design and Analysis of Algorithms  
Term(s): Fall 2025

**CS 165**: Project in Algorithms and Data Structures  
Term(s): Spring 2026

## Education

**University of California, Irvine**  
*Ph.D in Computer Science* | Sept 2025 - Present

**Orange Coast College**  
*A.A in Dance* | Aug 2025 - Present

**University of California, Irvine**  
*B.S in Computer Science* | Sept 2023 - Jun 2025

**Orange Coast College**  
*A.A in Liberal Arts* | Aug 2021 - May 2023

**Orange Coast College**  
*A.S in Computer Science* | Aug 2020 - May 2023

**Huntington Beach High School**  
*High School Diploma* | Aug 2017 - May 2021
